title: Mr. 5 Joins the Hunt
description: On pages 16–19, mr. 5 joins the hunt as dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride.
scene: Mr. 5 Joins the Hunt. Dorry and Brogy’s duel reaches a heartbreaking turning point as Baroque Works exploits the giants’ warrior pride. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Crack

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: GA...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Kah Kah!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Move it, you big fat lizard.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: leave it to me.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: 10,000 Kg Press!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Ah,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: So you've returned, have you Mr. S?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Snooze snooze

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmph, an impressive little ability you've got there, instantly crafting a hideous in these jungles...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Let me make one thing clear to you right now. This mission is still OURS to complete so I'd appreciate it if you didn't interfere.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We won't make the same mistake twice.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: mistakes? That's a little off, isn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You failed because you are weak.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's because we carelessly let our guards down! We had no idea the princess would have pirate escorts!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Had no idea!? Hmph, what childish excuses you resort to, don't you think?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: might I remind you that we are professionals.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: To lose to our enemies is an act as shameful as revealing our organization's existence to the general public.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The missions we undertake must be accomplished perfectly with no careless mistakes, you realize?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: However, considering you successfully managed to tail our targets to this island,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I shall grant you with 30% of the pay for this mission.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But if you still wish for me to not interfere,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm afraid I'll have to take some actions as to have you two never interfere with me again.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on mr. 5 joins the hunt. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
